name: tmgrammar-test-tools-vscode
description: Generate, refresh, and run TextMate syntax test assertions from VS Code.

commands.title: TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Assertions
TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Assertions (Full)
TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Assertions (Minimal)
TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Line Assertions
TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Line Assertions (Full)
TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Line Assertions (Minimal)
TM Grammar Test Tools: Replace Line Assertions
TM Grammar Test Tools: Replace Line Assertions (Full)
TM Grammar Test Tools: Replace Line Assertions (Minimal)

TM Grammar Test Tools: Insert Range Assertions (Minimal)

tmGrammarTestTools.configPath.description: Optional path to the grammar package.json used to load TextMate grammars. Relative paths resolve from the active document's workspace folder.

tmGrammarTestTools.enableCodeActions.description: When enabled, show Code Actions for inserting or refreshing assertions at the current cursor or selection, plus explicit line/range alternatives when useful.

tmGrammarTestTools.enableCodeLens.description: When enabled, show CodeLens commands near source lines that insert assertions for that line, switching between line and range behavior based on the current selection on the line.

tmGrammarTestTools.hideCodeLensOnComment.description: When enabled, hide CodeLens on source lines that look like language comments according to the active language configuration, falling back to the syntax-test header comment token when needed.

tmGrammarTestTools.grammarProvider.comma.description: Optional shell command that prints grammar file paths for the active document. Supports JSON output or newline-separated paths.

tmGrammarTestTools.grammarProvider.cwd.description: Working directory used when invoking tmGrammarTestTools.grammarProvider.command. Leave empty to use the active document's workspace folder and fall back to project root when the file is outside the workspace. If explicitly set to ${workspaceFolder}, the active file must belong to a workspace folder. Supports ${projectRoot}, ${workspaceFolder}, and ${fileDirname}.

tmGrammarTestTools.grammarProvider.scope.description: Optional list of exact syntax-test header scopes for which tmGrammarTestTools.grammarProvider.command should run. Leave empty to allow the provider for any scope.

tmGrammarTestTools.scopeMode.description: Controls whether generated assertions use exact full scope stacks or a reduced minimal form.

tmGrammarTestTools.autoLoadInstalledGram.description: When enabled, automatically load grammars contributed by installed VS Code extensions, including built-in ones, before local package.json and provider grammars.

tmGrammarTestTools.compactRanges.description: When enabled, merge disjoint caret ranges that share the same rendered scope list into a single assertion line when the syntax allows it.

tmGrammarTestTools.logGrammarDetails.description: When enabled, log detailed grammar selection info in the Output panel. Assertion generation logs the actually used grammar scopes with source labels; test runs log the merged grammar load order.

tmGrammarTestTools.testDiscovery.include.description: Optional glob patterns for additional syntax test file discovery in the Testing view. Matching files appear as candidate file items and are validated lazily when expanded or run, so prefer narrow patterns.

tmGrammarTestTools.testDiscovery.exclude.description: Optional glob patterns excluded from tmGrammarTestTools.testDiscovery.include.
